task-1773445221599-7vag0q.description: P1 [Phase 1] Add scheduled_start datetime field to Task model + Alembic migration. This is the critical missing field that lets the scheduling engine persist computed start times for calendar rendering.

task-1773445221609-qap5vs.description: P1 [Phase 1] Replace hardcoded dummy calendar events with real user tasks. Query tasks that have a due date or scheduled_start and render them as timed blocks on the week calendar grid.

task-1773445221616-xwzig5.description: P1 [Phase 1] Add duration to the natural language parser in AddTaskForm. Support '1h', '30m', '2h30m' syntax. Also add duration field to TaskItem for display/edit. Duration field already exists in DB but has no UI.

task-1773445226482-dreosb.description: P2 [Phase 2] Build auto-scheduling algorithm: given user tasks with due dates and durations, assign scheduled_start values by finding free slots within working hours (9am-6pm default), respecting priority order (p1 before p2, etc.) and due date constraints. Expose as POST /api/v1/tasks/schedule.

task-1773445228358-ybkcxu.description: P2 [Phase 2] Add working hours to user settings (stored server-side or localStorage). Used as the scheduling window by the auto-scheduling algorithm.

task-1773445230224-ajs1ph.description: P3 [Phase 3] Drag-to-reschedule on calendar: allow dragging a task block to a new time slot and PATCH scheduled_start via the API. Resize to change duration. Click to open edit drawer.

task-1773445232564-b2hf2a.description: P4 [Phase 4] Wire up Day/Week/Month/Year view switcher buttons in the calendar. Implement Day view (single-day grid) and Month view (grid of days with task chips). Year view as a heat map of task density.

task-1773445234667-eqkkmx.description: P5 [Phase 5] Conflict detection: visually highlight overlapping scheduled task blocks in red. Add 'Reschedule all' button. Keyboard shortcut 'n' to focus AddTaskForm. Improve empty state to guide users toward scheduling workflow.
